## Architecture evidence

- [ ] Canonical [architecture checklist](docs/architecture/architecture-checklist.md) reviewed for this change; every applicable item has evidence and every N/A has a reason.
- [ ] Exact verification commands and results are linked.
- [ ] Contract/schema/ownership impact is stated.
- [ ] Migration authority, route, cohort, and rollback impact is stated.
- [ ] Approved exceptions: None, or exact non-expired IDs are linked.
